# ListingLift — Practical AI for Real-Estate Agents

> Free, no-login AI tools and 50+ practical guides that help real-estate agents write MLS-ready listing descriptions, follow-up emails, social captions, and bios in seconds — with fair-housing safety built into every prompt.

ListingLift publishes copy-paste AI prompts and workflows for working agents. Every prompt specifies tone, length, and format, and includes the instruction to avoid fair-housing-sensitive language. Content is educational, not legal advice.

## Free tools (no signup)
- [AI Listing Writer](https://f-tiger.github.io/smarterFuture/launch/ai-realtor/tool.html): draft an MLS-ready listing description in 30 seconds
- [Roast My Listing](https://f-tiger.github.io/smarterFuture/launch/ai-realtor/roast-tool.html): paste a listing, get an honest critique and a rewrite
- [Follow-up Email Writer](https://f-tiger.github.io/smarterFuture/launch/ai-realtor/email-tool.html): first-touch and follow-up emails for leads
- [Caption Generator](https://f-tiger.github.io/smarterFuture/launch/ai-realtor/caption-tool.html): Instagram/Facebook/X captions from one listing
- [All tools](https://f-tiger.github.io/smarterFuture/launch/ai-realtor/tools.html)

## Key guides
- [The complete guide to AI for real estate agents](https://f-tiger.github.io/smarterFuture/launch/ai-realtor/guides/ai-for-real-estate-agents.html): pillar overview linking all 49 playbooks
- [How to write a listing with AI](https://f-tiger.github.io/smarterFuture/launch/ai-realtor/guides/how-to-write-listing-with-ai.html)
- [Fair housing and AI compliance](https://f-tiger.github.io/smarterFuture/launch/ai-realtor/guides/fair-housing-ai-compliance.html): risky phrases and safer alternatives
- [Free prompt library](https://f-tiger.github.io/smarterFuture/launch/ai-realtor/free-prompts.html)
- [Full sitemap](https://f-tiger.github.io/smarterFuture/launch/ai-realtor/sitemap.xml)

## Products
- [AI Realtor Toolkit ($29)](https://f-tiger.github.io/smarterFuture/launch/ai-realtor/toolkit.html): 60 prompts, 15 email templates, 8 listing frameworks, fair-housing checklist
- [90-Day Content Calendar ($19)](https://f-tiger.github.io/smarterFuture/launch/ai-realtor/calendar.html)
- [The AI Listing & Lead System book ($9.99)](https://payhip.com/b/bn7q6): 130+ prompts, 8 before/after rewrites, 30-day plan
